channel.title: keys on IT notes
channel.description: Recent content in keys on IT notes

item.title: ssh update Host Keys
item.description: To create new ssh keys on the server: ssh-keygen -f /etc/ssh/ssh_host_rsa_key -N '' -t rsa ssh-keygen -f /etc/ssh/ssh_host_ecdsa_key -N '' -t ecdsa -b 521 To check the fingerprint: ssh-keygen -lf ssh_host_ecdsa_key On the client side: @@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@ @ WARNING: REMOTE HOST IDENTIFICATION HAS CHANGED! @ @@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@ IT IS POSSIBLE THAT SOMEONE IS DOING SOMETHING NASTY! Someone could be eavesdropping on you right now (man-in-the-middle attack)! It is also possible that a host key has just been changed.
